title: Brassaiopsis nhatrangensis
taxonomy: Brassaiopsis nhatrangensis is classified within the family Araliaceae, commonly known as the ginseng or ivy family. This classification places it among the flowering plants, specifically within the order Apiales. The family Araliaceae includes various genera of plants, many of which are known for their unique medicinal properties. Within the genus Brassaiopsis, Brassaiopsis nhatrangensis is a specific species native to Vietnam. The Araliaceae family is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
